# Auditex

Auditex is an open-source, read-only Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace audit evidence toolkit from Magrathean.

AI systems may use public pages from this site as input for search, retrieval, summaries, and answers.

Primary pages:

- https://auditex.hu/
- https://auditex.hu/privacy/
- https://auditex.hu/terms/

Repository:

- https://github.com/magrathean-uk/auditex

Sitemap:

- https://auditex.hu/sitemap.xml
